return(function(...)local v={"\107\118\106\084\112\085\089\080\107\067\108\113\057\104\106\075\087\085\069\061","\070\055\119\074\116\053\056\113";"\110\073\098\089\057\118\122\100\097\109\111\114\090\057\118\054","\052\050\057\108\069\071\084\074\067\086\116\084\098\100\084\119";"\110\109\108\088\067\104\097\116\110\072\121\113\085\080\112\051\107\073\056\061","\065\085\111\089\103\048\057\109\079\065\105\067\068\121\098\065\088\070\043\112\079\118\048\067\115\098\066\072\104\078\076\108\121\055\074\075\081\097\057\111\071\085\104\067","\101\117\104\085\077\120\076\104\087\082\061\061";"\085\087\048\049\121\070\081\050\052\050\118\061";"\085\109\097\116\052\071\090\087\085\085\078\050\067\071\106\078\097\073\056\061","\117\089\079\078\097\117\090\065\112\109\108\053\110\109\085\061";"\097\085\065\051\052\057\097\090\112\080\112\087\107\057\111\067\098\089\098\061";"\098\109\108\050\052\104\108\073\097\082\061\061","\111\057\090\067\082\086\112\051\085\071\100\104\107\048\097\082\056\048\071\061";"\115\081\120\054\098\122\081\061","\086\057\097\097\085\109\089\051\107\057\074\117\090\043\097\049";"\104\118\102\081\066\105\053\100";"\110\086\118\054\069\104\051\055\097\117\114\082\085\089\074\086\107\082\061\061","\087\043\090\074\112\043\108\116\111\085\122\067\090\057\108\071\052\105\061\061","\078\109\112\067\083\051\081\068\072\121\114\052\050\106\057\122","\098\109\108\122\098\073\056\061";"\110\049\056\061";"\098\085\074\103\076\109\074\113\067\072\074\056\087\074\106\051\112\081\061\061","\068\117\076\083\098\118\071\061","\070\073\074\118\069\072\070\108\067\049\116\071\057\074\055\061";"\057\118\108\086\056\048\090\104\087\080\114\066\076\108\111\068\067\081\061\061";"\043\055\061\061";"\115\051\080\099\079\075\051\061";"\098\102\103\078\111\068\111\081\056\055\061\061";"\098\104\057\100\110\086\057\100\069\117\090\065\069\072\084\074";"\053\101\098\061","\109\113\073\089\049\048\068\119","\112\118\120\104\085\109\116\054\052\108\111\056\097\049\106\078";"\082\104\078\068\090\072\121 return(function(v,C,W,U,m,B,P,u,a,L,S,Y,g,n,N,y,K,D,F,I,t,h,z,e)I,t,L,e,u,D,a,z,h,g,S,K,y,n,Y,N,F=function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function(W,U,m,B,P,L)return n(v,{W,U;m;B,P;L},s,C)end return W end,function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function(W,U)return n(v,{W,U},s,C)end return W end,{},function(v)local s,n=(273399+(194470+-249536))+-218332,v[23725-23724]while n do U({},{[s(39692+20099)]=e;[s(363536+-303756)]=v;[s(246948-187030)]=function()return(-26860+-190375)-(-634607)end})end end,function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function(...)return n(v,{...},s,C)end return W end,function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function(W,U,m,B,P)return n(v,{W,U;m,B,P},s,C)end return W end,function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function(W,U,m)return n(v,{W,U;m},s,C)end return W end,{},function(v,s)local C=z(s)local W=function()return n(v,{},s,C)end return W end,function(n,W,U,m)local
